[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010110 3
1 1111100 5
2 0011010 3
3 1111001 5
4 0110011 4
5 0001100 2
6 1101111 6
7 0000010 1

01 10 1000100 2
12 21 0010110 3 match 0
23 32 0010000 1
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 1001100 3
56 65 0000010 1 match 7
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 1000000 1

13 31 0010000 1

46 64 0000000 a

71 17 1000000 1

36 63 0000000 a
47 74 1000000 1

61 16 0000010 1 match 7
72 27 0000000 a

37 73 0000000 a
